tournaments.name: Spring Scholastic Open
tournaments.location: Chess Club HQ, Upper West Side
tournaments.desc: Our flagship spring tournament! Open to all skill levels. Trophies for top 3 in each section.

tournaments.name: Junior Rapid Championship
tournaments.desc: A fast-paced rapid tournament for our youngest players. G/15 time control.

tournaments.name: NYC Youth Invitational
tournaments.desc: Invitational for top-rated players. USCF rated.

camps.name: Summer Chess Camp – Session 1
camps.location: Chess Club HQ, Upper West Side
camps.desc: Chess fundamentals, puzzle competitions, board games, snacks. Certificate of completion included.

camps.name: Summer Chess Camp – Session 2
camps.location: Chess Club HQ, Upper West Side
camps.desc: Advanced strategy, tournament simulations, team challenges, lunch, guest grandmaster visit, trophy ceremony.
